message:
Improve skill trigger for commit requests

Add "asks to commit changes" as a trigger so the skill activates when
users request commits, not just when running git commit directly.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+---
+title: Improve skill trigger for commit requests
+type: change
+author: mavam
+component: git
+created: 2025-12-05T06:04:27.179454Z
+---
+
+The skill now triggers when users ask to commit changes, not just when
+running git commit or asking about commit message format.

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 ---
 name: writing-commit-messages
-description: Write git commit messages for Tenzir repositories. Use when running git commit, drafting commit messages, or asking about commit message format, subject lines, or commit best practices.
+description: Write git commit messages for Tenzir repositories. Use when the user asks to commit changes, running git commit, drafting commit messages, or asking about commit message format, subject lines, or commit best practices.
 ---
 
 # Commit Message Writing
